examples: There were, however, fluctuations in the climatic conditions, with the consequences that wet conditions were followed by dry ones, so that the availability of plants and animals oscillated brusquely.
When Brin asked whether the Baidu logo was a dog's paw, Li corrected him brusquely.
The fans now want to bring back the manager brusquely dismissed last fall (after another epochal disaster).
East European politicians, perhaps because of their history, are used to obeying tough instructions from outside, and imposing them brusquely.
